meta.toolResultPreview: 1: --- 2: name: llm-wiki-pm 3: description: Persistent PM knowledge base, competitive intel, customer notes, strategy, roadmap, AI market. Markdown wiki with entities, concepts, comparisons. Ingest sources, query, update with diffs, lint with tiered reports. 4: --- 5: 6: # LLM Wiki PM 7: 8: Persistent knowledge base for PM work. Non-coding. Domain: product strategy, 9: competitive landscape, customer relations, roadmap, AI market, internal org. 10: 11: Markdown files in a directory. Readable in Obsidian, VS Code, any editor. 12: The agent writes. vision.rationale: README.md clearly articulates the goal of creating a 'compounding knowledge base' for PMs to avoid the 'bookkeeping overhead' of personal wikis.

architecture.rationale: SKILL.md defines a distinct three-layer hierarchy (raw, wiki, schema) and specific responsibilities for each directory.

principles_guidelines.rationale: The SKILL.md contains strict operational rules (e.g., 'Orient Every Session', 'Privacy filter', 'Backlink audit'), and templates/SCHEMA.md defines domain-specific taxonomies.
